mapper.sql: SELECT score_id, branch_id, data_year, city, score_category, positive_distance, negative_distance, category_score, rank_num, create_time FROM jw_branch_score

SELECT s.score_id, s.branch_id, s.data_year, s.city, s.score_category, s.positive_distance, s.negative_distance, s.category_score, s.rank_num, s.create_time, s.quadrant, s.median_site_rank, s.median_branch_rank, bi.secondary_branch, bi.primary_branch, bi.grid_code FROM jw_branch_score s LEFT JOIN jw_branch_info bi ON s.branch_id = bi.branch_id
mapper.select: WHERE branch_id = #{branchId} AND data_year = #{dataYear} ORDER BY score_category
WHERE city = #{city} AND data_year = #{dataYear} ORDER BY score_category, rank_num
WHERE city = #{city} AND data_year BETWEEN #{startYear} AND #{endYear} ORDER BY score_category, rank_num
WHERE s.city = #{city} AND s.data_year = #{dataYear} AND s.score_category = #{category} ORDER BY s.rank_num
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jw_branch_score ( branch_id, data_year, city, score_category, positive_distance, negative_distance, category_score, rank_num, create_time ) VALUES ( #{branchId}, #{dataYear}, #{city}, #{scoreCategory}, #{positiveDistance}, #{negativeDistance}, #{categoryScore}, #{rankNum}, now() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM jw_branch_score WHERE score_id IN
#{id}
DELETE FROM jw_branch_score WHERE city = #{city} AND data_year = #{dataYear}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jw_branch_score ( branch_id, data_year, city, score_category, positive_distance, negative_distance, category_score, rank_num, create_time ) VALUES ( #{branchId}, #{dataYear}, #{city}, #{scoreCategory}, #{positiveDistance}, #{negativeDistance}, #{categoryScore}, #{rankNum}, now() )

INSERT INTO jw_branch_score ( branch_id, data_year, city, score_category, positive_distance, negative_distance, category_score, rank_num, create_time ) VALUES
(#{item.branchId}, #{item.dataYear}, #{item.city}, #{item.scoreCategory}, #{item.positiveDistance}, #{item.negativeDistance}, #{item.categoryScore}, #{item.rankNum}, now())
